Bash(TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6MSwicm9sZSI6ImFkbWluIiwiaWF0IjoxNzczNDg0NjAzLCJleHAiOjE3NzM0ODU1MDN9.Y2Qzq9-dJj38aOB0CNvU2xbvBhpYnpHzW11bX_Iy2h0" && curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/v1/rooms -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" > C:/xampp/htdocs/hotel/tmp_rooms.json && node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const j=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('C:/xampp/htdocs/hotel/tmp_rooms.json','utf8'\)\); const rooms=j.data||j.rooms||j; const r=Array.isArray\(rooms\)?rooms.find\(r=>r.room_number==='104'\):null; if\(r\){console.log\('Room 104:'\); console.log\('  Type:', r.room_type\); console.log\('  Status:', r.status\); console.log\('  Floor:', r.floor\); console.log\('  Base Rate:', r.base_rate\); console.log\('  Cleanliness:', r.cleanliness_status\); console.log\('  Max Occupancy:', r.max_occupancy\);} else { console.log\('Room 104 not found'\); console.log\('Keys:', Object.keys\(j\)\); }" && rm C:/xampp/htdocs/hotel/tmp_rooms.json)
